title: Customer Churn Prediction Model
description: Built a supervised machine learning model (Random Forest) to predict customer churn, achieving an F1-score of 0.85. Addressed dataset class imbalance using SMOTE techniques, improving recall on the minority class by 15%. Conducted feature importance analysis to identify key churn drivers.

title: Real-Estate Price Predictor
description: Engineered a robust dataset of 10,000+ listings by automating web scraping and implementing statistical outlier detection. Developed an XGBoost regression model to estimate housing prices, achieving high precision with a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) within 5% of market value.

title: Online Voting System
description: The Online Voting System is a secure, web-based platform designed to simplify and digitize the voting process. It enables users to cast their votes electronically, ensuring accessibility, transparency, and efficiency.

title: Hostel Electricity Bill Management
description: A digital platform for managing hostel electricity readings, billing, and student-wise consumption tracking. Reduced manual data entry time by 40%.

title: Expense Tracker
description: Expense Tracker is a fully responsive single-page application to track income and expenses in real time.Designed clean, intuitive user interface using modern CSS layout techniques.

title: Cric-score
description: A live cricket score tracker with ball-by-ball updates and automatic run rate calculation.

title: Rock Paper Scissors
description: Rock Paper Scissors is an interactive web-based game  allowing users to play against a computer opponent with real-time score tracking
